title: Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Bihar

overview.short: The Kanwar Taal or Kabar Taal Lake or Kabartal Wetland located in Begusarai district of Bihar, India, Asia's largest freshwater oxbow lake.
overview.description: The Kanwar Taal or Kabar Taal Lake or Kabartal Wetland located in Begusarai district of Bihar, India, Asia's largest freshwater oxbow lake. It is approximately six times the size of the Bharatpur Sanctuary. In November 2020, the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) declared it the first Ramsar site in Bihar. It is one of the 98 Ramsar sites in India now.

topPlaces.name: Jaimangla Garh Temple
topPlaces.description: Jaimangla Garh Temple is an ancient historical Hindu temple in Begusarai district of Bihar state of India. It is surrounded by Kanwar Lake.

topPlaces.name: Kanausi
topPlaces.description: Kanausi lies in the Kesari Khera Ward of Lucknow Municipal Corporation. The ward's councilor lives in Kanausi.

topPlaces.name: Manjhaul
topPlaces.description: Manjhaul (also pronounced as Majhaul or Majhauli) is a village in the Begusarai district of Bihar state in India. It is notable for the Jaimangla Gadh Temple and Kaber Lake (Birds Sanctuary).

topPlaces.name: Sonma, Begusarai
topPlaces.description: Sonma is a big village at Garhpura block, in Begusarai district, Bihar, India. It is also sometimes written as "Sonwan".

items.note: Jaimangla Garh Temple is an ancient historical Hindu temple in Begusarai district of Bihar state of India. It is surrounded by Kanwar Lake.
Kanausi lies in the Kesari Khera Ward of Lucknow Municipal Corporation. The ward's councilor lives in Kanausi.

Sonma is a big village at Garhpura block, in Begusarai district, Bihar, India. It is also sometimes written as "Sonwan".

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (106 km) and the nearest railway station is Muzaffarpur Junction (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanwar Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jaimangla Garh Temple, Kanausi, Manjhaul, Sonma, Begusarai.
